svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 15px; margin-left: 2px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 18px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;
display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 38px; margin-left: 2px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #555555;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#555555, #a4a4a4); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: Krähenfuss-Notation · PK = Primärschlüssel · FK = Fremdschlüssel · Sätze stecken in match_scores, Statistiken werden zur Laufzeit aus points berechnet · V6–V10 ergänzt (siehe §11.1)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(94, 142, 62), rgb(101, 142, 73));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 234px; height: 1px; padding-top: 281px; margin-left: 30px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
players
PK id : UUID
first_name, last_name
gender, handedness, backhand_type
ranking, nationality
active : boolean
birth_date : date
FK owner_id : UUID (V6)
created/updated_at · _by (V7)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(74, 119, 180), rgb(105, 144, 197));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 259px; height: 1px; padding-top: 301px; margin-left: 420px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
matches
PK id : UUID
FK player1_id → players
FK player2_id → players
sets_to_win : int
match_tiebreak, short_set : bool
status : varchar
FK owner_id : UUID (V6)
created/updated_at · _by (V7)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(47, 125, 168), rgb(86, 153, 190));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 274px; height: 1px; padding-top: 71px; margin-left: 820px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
match_scores
PK id : UUID
FK match_id : UUID (UNIQUE)
points_player1/2 : int
games_player1/2 : int
sets_player1/2 : int
is_deuce, is_advantage_player1
current_set : int
is_done : bool · winner
aces_player1/2, serving_player

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(94, 142, 62), rgb(101, 142, 73));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 274px; height: 1px; padding-top: 351px; margin-left: 820px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
points
PK id : UUID
FK match_id : UUID
set_number, game_number, point_number
winner : int (1/2)
point_type, stroke_type, direction
serving_player, is_break_point
serve_attempt : int (1/2)
remark, recorded_at
created/updated_at · _by (V7)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(198, 137, 10), rgb(165, 113, 3));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 284px; height: 1px; padding-top: 561px; margin-left: 410px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
match_analysis
PK id : UUID
FK match_id : UUID (UNIQUE)
status : varchar
key_moments
own_/opponent_strengths
own_/opponent_weaknesses
recommendations : text (JSON)
model_used, error_message
generated_at : timestamp

div.div:
user_preferences (V9)
PK user_id : UUID (Keycloak sub)
language : varchar(2) [de/en/it/fr]
updated_at : timestamp
keine FK — Bezug über JWT-Identität

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(42, 157, 143), rgb(47, 146, 134));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 284px; height: 1px; padding-top: 601px; margin-left: 770px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
match_player_notes (V10)
PK id : UUID
FK match_id → matches
FK player_id → players
note : varchar(2000)
UNIQUE (match_id, player_id)
created/updated_at · _by (V10)
